memoryArtifacts.headline: Inscription on grave
memoryArtifacts.description: Sir William Molyneux, Knt., Lord of the Manor of Sefton, who was sent three times against the Scots by Henry the Eighth of England. In war he fought most courageously and at Flodden with his own hands …

zh.Sefton, Lancashire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓
zh.Bold, Prescot, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾波爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Molyneux於1483年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Molyneux38歲，母親Dame Anna Dutton33歲。他於1497年與Lady Jane Rugge在英國藍卡爾澤福頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年3月16日在英國藍卡爾澤福頓享年65歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾澤福頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Molyneux于1483年出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Molyneux38岁，母亲Dame Anna Dutton33岁。他于1497年与Lady Jane Rugge在英国藍卡爾澤福頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年3月16日在英国藍卡爾澤福頓享年65岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾澤福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Molyneux was born in 1483, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Molyneux, was 38 and his mother, Dame Anna Dutton, was 33. He married Lady Jane Rugge in 1497, in Sefton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 16 March 1548, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Sefton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Molyneux est né en 1483, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Molyneux, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Dame Anna Dutton, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jane Rugge en 1497, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1548, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Molyneux 1483 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Molyneux 38 und seine Mutter Dame Anna Dutton 33. Er hat 1497 in Sefton, Lancashire, England Lady Jane Rugge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 16. März 1548 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Sefton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Sefton, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Molyneux è nato il nel 1483 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Molyneux, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Dame Anna Dutton, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Lady Jane Rugge nel 1497, nel Sefton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 marzo 1548, nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Sefton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Molyneuxが1483年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Molyneuxは38歳，母Dame Anna Duttonは33歳であった。1497年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでLady Jane Ruggeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年3月16日にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで65歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアセフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Molyneux(이)가 1483년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Molyneux(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Anna Dutton(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1497년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Lady Jane Rugge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 3월 16일 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Molyneux nasceu em 1483, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Molyneux, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Dame Anna Dutton, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Jane Rugge em 1497, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de março de 1548, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Molyneux родился в 1483 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Molyneux было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Anna Dutton, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane Rugge в 1497 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 марта 1548 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Molyneux nació en 1483, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Molyneux, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Dame Anna Dutton, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lady Jane Rugge en 1497, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1548, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
